alerts.headline: Blizzard Warning issued February 23 at 3:13AM EST until February 24 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Blizzard conditions. Additional snow accumulations between
14 and 21 inches. Winds gusting as high as 75 mph.

* WHERE...Portions of eastern and southeastern Massachusetts and
Rhode Island.

* WHEN...Until 7 AM EST Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities may drop below 1/4 mile due to falling and
blowing snow. The strong winds and weight of snow on tree limbs
may down power lines and could cause sporadic power outages.
Whiteout conditions are expected and will make travel treacherous
and potentially life-threatening. Travel could be very difficult
to impossible. Areas of blowing snow could significantly reduce
visibility. The hazardous conditions could impact the Monday
morning and evening commutes. Very strong winds could cause
extensive tree damage.

alerts.headline: Coastal Flood Advisory issued February 23 at 12:29AM EST until February 23 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Up to one foot of inundation above ground level
expected in low-lying areas near shorelines and tidal
waterways (11.3 to 13.2 feet Mean Lower Low Water).

* WHERE...Eastern Essex MA, Suffolk MA and Eastern Norfolk MA
Counties.

* WHEN...Until 7 AM EST this morning.

* IMPACTS...Shallow pockets of flooding less than one foot deep
affects the lowest lying areas along the coast, including
Morrissey Boulevard in Boston. Most roads remain passable.
Flooding up to one foot deep affects coastal roads on the
North Shore from Salem to Gloucester and Newburyport. Rough
surf will cause flooding on some coastal roads around the time
of high tide due to splashover.

nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Heavy Snow And Areas Of Blowing Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow and areas of blowing snow. Cloudy, with a low around 27. Northeast wind 29 to 32 mph, with gusts as high as 52 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Heavy Snow And Areas Of Blowing Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow and areas of blowing snow. Cloudy, with a high near 30. North wind 21 to 36 mph, with gusts as high as 59 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 12 to 18 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow likely before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 22. Northwest wind 13 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 41 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New snow accumulation of 3 to 5 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 32. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 14. West wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 1pm, then rain and snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 38. South wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain And Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow before 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow between 11am and noon, then a chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 39. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 7pm, then rain and snow likely between 7pm and 10pm, then rain and snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. South wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow. Partly sunny, with a high near 41. West wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 25. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 42. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 32. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 41. West wind around 10 mph.
